name: superdev
description: Six-skill toolkit for full-stack monorepo builds: PRD+design audit and build orchestration, design-to-Next.js, enterprise Nest.js backend, security audit, prototype-to-SaaS migration, and exploratory QA. Includes 24 specialized subagents (10 core build agents + 5 security agents + 5 migration agents + 4 QA agents), shadcn-everywhere frontend enforcement, view-shape contract, Title Case enums, Docker-for-all-infra, and optional agent-teams mode for adversarial audits. Workspace-scope agnostic: hooks and agent commands use path-based pnpm filters so it works in any pnpm monorepo regardless of the @scope used.
